title: Kaya’s Mansion Draws the Crew In
description: On pages 17–19, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Let's forget about searching for a ship in this village

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We'll go and search somewhere else...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Okay! But we're not in a hurry anyways,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I still want some more meat!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Let's buy some more meat for our supply!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: ...said earlier that you're looking for com- panions?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Is there somebody who wants to be our companion?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What kind of attitude is that?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What is it, Kaya Ojou- Sama?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I want to see usopp- San...

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
